mission.title: localai: Please support reranker API
mission.description: Please support reranker API. Requested by 5+ users.

steps.title: Check current localai deployment
steps.description:
Verify your localai version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai
helm list -n localai 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working localai installation.

steps.title: Review localai configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant localai configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai
kubectl get configmap -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=localai
```
Nowadays, embedding + reranker is the SOTA solution to improve the accuracy of RAG system. We've already have the embedding API support in LocalAI, it would be a big step forward if we can support reranker API.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Please support reranker API
steps.description:
This PR fixes #2018 . It was quite easy out to assemble as `rerankers` have a very good support for models out there.

It adds support for rerankers API, specifically implements the jina reranker APIs documented here: https://jina.ai/reranker/#apiform, behind the hoods, uses
```yaml
name: jina-reranker-v1-base-en
backend: rerankers
parameters:
  model: cross-encoder

usage: |
    You can test this model with curl like this:

    curl http://localhost:8080/v1/rerank \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -d '{
      "model": "jina-reranker-v1-base-en",
      "query": "Organic skincare products for sensitive skin",
      "documents": [
        "Eco-friendly kitchenware for modern homes",
        "Biodegradable cleaning supplies for eco-conscious consumers",
        "Organic cotton baby clothes for sensitive skin",
        "Natural organic skincare range for sen
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai
kubectl get events -n localai --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Please support reranker API" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This PR fixes #2018 . It was quite easy out to assemble as `rerankers` have a very good support for models out there.

It adds support for rerankers API, specifically implements the jina reranker APIs documented here: https://jina.ai/reranker/#apiform, behind the hoods, uses https://github.com/AnswerDotAI/rerankers for calculations.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with localai installed or the issue environment reproducible.
